title: K-200 Systems Acceptance Test Procedure
text:
# K-200 Systems Acceptance Test Procedure

Document number: MD-DOC-412-B. Revision: B. Type: procedure. Author: Aisha Mbeki. Created: 2023-09-26. Last modified: 2024-05-20. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Systems subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1048, P-1164.
